title: euchiton brassii
intro: Euchiton brassii, also known as the New Zealand copper fern or copper shrub, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Euchiton brassii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Euchiton brassii can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
